---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a new feature / 建议新功能
labels: enhancement
---

**Package / 包名**
<!-- e.g. @grid-table/view -->

**Use Case / 使用场景**
<!-- Describe the problem you're trying to solve / 描述你想解决的问题 -->

**Proposed Solution / 建议方案**
<!-- Describe your proposed API or behavior / 描述你建议的 API 或行为 -->

**Alternatives Considered / 其他方案**
<!-- Any alternative solutions you've considered / 你考虑过的其他方案 -->
